Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

Full_Payload_Orderno AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Avacommitdate AS AVALARA_COMMITED_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Avadate AS AVALARA_DATE,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Avarefunddate AS REFUND_DATE,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Avataxdate AS TAX_DATE,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Avavoiddate AS VOID_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Avainformation_Ordercode AS ORDER_CODE,

Full_Payload_B2Bid AS DTE_RETAILER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Basestore AS BASE_STORE,

Full_Payload_Business AS ORDER_BUSINESS,

Full_Payload_Buyername AS BUYER_NAME,

Full_Payload_Carrier AS ORDER_CARRIER,

Full_Payload_Cegidinternalid AS CEGID_INTERNAL_ID,

Full_Payload_Cfdicode AS CFDI_CODE,

Full_Payload_Channeladvisorordercode AS CHANNEL_ADVISIOR_ORDER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Channeladvisororiginalordercode AS CHANNEL_ADVISOR_ORIGINAL_ORDER_REFERENCE,

Full_Payload_Containspreorderproducts AS CONTAINS_PREORDER_PRODUCT_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Consumerfiscalregimecode AS CONSUMER_FISCAL_REGIME_CODE,

Full_Payload_Countryisocode AS COUNTRY_ISO_CODE,

Full_Payload_Creditnotedate AS CREDIT_NOTE_DATE,

Full_Payload_Creditnoteno AS CREDIT_NOTE_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customerno AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customertyp AS CONSUMER_TYPE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Internalcustomercode AS CONSUMER_INTERNAL_CODE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Shippingandbillingequal AS SHIPPING_BILLING_ADDRESS_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Deliverydescription AS DELIVERY_METHOD_DESCRIPTION,

Full_Payload_Deliverymode AS DELIVERY_MODE,

Full_Payload_Dispatchtype AS DISPATCH_TYPE,

Full_Payload_Saleschannel AS SALES_CHANNEL,

Full_Payload_Distributionchannel AS DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL,

Full_Payload_Division AS ORDER_DIVISION,

Full_Payload_Expirationtime AS EXPIRATION_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Externalreference AS EXTERNAL_REFERENCE,

Full_Payload_Fiscalentitytype AS INVOICE_FISCAL_ENTITY_TYPE,

Full_Payload_Hardageverificationmethod AS HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_METHOD,

Full_Payload_Hardageverificationneeded AS HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Invoicedate AS INVOICE_DATE,

Full_Payload_Invoiceno AS INVOICE_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Invoicerequired AS INVOICE_REQUIRED_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Isdirectmarket AS DIRECT_RESELLER_MARKET_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Islendingextensionconsumed AS LENDING_EXSTENSION_CONSUMED_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Ispayperlink AS PAYPERLINK_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Ispartialreturn AS PARTIAL_RETURN_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Lendingorderstatus AS LENDING_ORDER_STATUS,

Full_Payload_Locationaddress AS SALES_LOCATION_ADDRESS,

Full_Payload_Locationid AS SALES_LOCATION_ID,

Full_Payload_Locationname AS SALES_LOCATION_NAME,

Full_Payload_Mainreason AS RETURN_REASON_MAIN,

Full_Payload_Marketplaceid AS MARKETPLACE_ID,

Full_Payload_Marketplacename AS MARKETPLACE_NAME,

Full_Payload_Marketplaceordercode AS MARKETPLACE_ORDER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Marketplaceoriginalordercode AS MARKETPLACE_ORIGINAL_ORDER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Orderchannel AS ORDER_CHANNEL,

Full_Payload_Orderreason AS ORDER_REASON,

Full_Payload_Orderrefno AS ORDER_REFERENCE_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Orderstatus AS ORDER_STATUS,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamplocalized AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME_LOCALIZED,

Type_Code AS ORDER_TYPE,

Full_Payload_Paymentstatus AS PAYMENT_STATUS,

Full_Payload_Paymenttype AS PAYMENT_METHOD,

full_payload_parentOrderCode AS PARENT_ORDER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Placedby AS ORDER_PLACED_BY,

Full_Payload_Platform AS PRODUCT_PLATFORM,

Full_Payload_Resellerid AS PMI_SELLER_ID,

NVL(Full_Payload_Returndate,'') AS RETURN_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Carriergross AS SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Carriernet AS SALES_PRICE_NET_PLUS_DELIVERY,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Carriervat AS SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY_PLUS_VAT,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Currency AS ORDER_CURRENCY,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Gross AS SALES_PRICE_GROSS,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Grossoriginal AS SALES_PRICE_GROSS_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Net AS SALES_PRICE_NET,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Netoriginal AS SALES_PRICE_NET_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Paymentcostgross AS PAYMENT_COST_GROSS,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Paymentcostnet AS PAYMENT_COST_NET,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Paymentcostvat AS PAYMENT_COST_VAT,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Salesvatrate AS VAT_RATE,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Subtotalgross AS SUBTOTAL_GROSS,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Totalexempt AS TOTAL_EXEMPT_ON_ORDER,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Totaltaxable AS TOTAL_TAXABLE_AMOUNT,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Totaltaxcalculated AS TOTAL_CALCULATED_TAX,

Full_Payload_Salesprice_Vatvalue AS TOTAL_VAT,

Full_Payload_Sapid AS SAP_CUSTOMER_CODE,

Full_Payload_Shippingdate AS SHIPPING_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Shop_Shopno AS SHOP_TYPE_INDICATOR,

Full_Payload_State AS COSNUMER_STATE,

Full_Payload_Subreason AS RETURN_REASON_SECONDARY,

Full_Payload_Target AS TARGET_SYSTEM,

Full_Payload_Taxid AS TAX_ID,

Full_Payload_Transactioncode AS TRANSACTION_IDENTIFIER,

Full_Payload_Transno AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Wbselement AS WBS_CODE,

Reason_Description AS ORDER_REASON_DESCRIPTION,

Type_Description AS ORDER_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: Full_Payload_Orderno

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_ISO_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
AVALARA_COMMITED_DATETIME DATETIME,
AVALARA_DATE DATE,
REFUND_DATE DATE,
TAX_DATE DATE,
VOID_DATETIME DATETIME,
ORDER_CODE TEXT,
DTE_RETAILER_CODE TEXT,
BASE_STORE TEXT,
ORDER_BUSINESS TEXT,
BUYER_NAME TEXT,
ORDER_CARRIER TEXT,
CEGID_INTERNAL_ID TEXT,
CFDI_CODE TEXT,
CHANNEL_ADVISOR_ORDER_CODE TEXT,
CHANNEL_ADVISOR_ORIGINAL_ORDER_REFERENCE TEXT,
CONTAINS_PREORDER_PRODUCT_FLAG FLAG,
CONSUMER_FISCAL_REGIME_CODE TEXT,
COUNTRY_ISO_CODE TEXT,
CREDIT_NOTE_DATE DATE,
CREDIT_NOTE_NUMBER TEXT,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CONSUMER_TYPE TEXT,
CONSUMER_INTERNAL_CODE TEXT,
SHIPPING_BILLING_ADDRESS_FLAG FLAG,
DELIVERY_METHOD_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
DELIVERY_MODE TEXT,
DISPATCH_TYPE TEXT,
SALES_CHANNEL TEXT,
DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL TEXT,
ORDER_DIVISION TEXT,
EXPIRATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
EXTERNAL_REFERENCE TEXT,
INVOICE_FISCAL_ENTITY_TYPE TEXT,
HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_METHOD TEXT,
HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_FLAG FLAG,
INVOICE_DATE DATE,
INVOICE_NUMBER TEXT,
INVOICE_REQUIRED_FLAG FLAG,
DIRECT_RESELLER_MARKET_FLAG FLAG,
LENDING_EXTENSION_CONSUMED_FLAG FLAG,
PAY_PER_LINK_FLAG FLAG,
PARTIAL_RETURN_FLAG FLAG,
LENDING_ORDER_STATUS TEXT,
SALES_LOCATION_ADDRESS TEXT,
SALES_LOCATION_ID TEXT,
SALES_LOCATION_NAME TEXT,
RETURN_REASON_MAIN TEXT,
MARKETPLACE_ID TEXT,
MARKETPLACE_NAME TEXT,
MARKETPLACE_ORDER_CODE TEXT,
MARKETPLACE_ORIGINAL_ORDER_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_CHANNEL TEXT,
ORDER_REASON TEXT,
ORDER_REFERENCE_NUMBER TEXT,
ORDER_STATUS TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME_LOCALIZED DATETIME,
ORDER_TYPE TEXT,
PAYMENT_STATUS TEXT,
PAYMENT_METHOD TEXT,
PARENT_ORDER_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_PLACED_BY TEXT,
PRODUCT_PLATFORM TEXT,
PMI_SELLER_ID TEXT,
RETURN_DATETIME DATETIME,
SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY DECIMAL,
SALES_PRICE_NET_PLUS_DELIVERY DECIMAL,
SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY_PLUS_VAT DECIMAL,
ORDER_CURRENCY TEXT,
SALES_PRICE_GROSS DECIMAL,
SALES_PRICE_GROSS_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
SALES_PRICE_NET DECIMAL,
SALES_PRICE_NET_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
PAYMENT_COST_GROSS DECIMAL,
PAYMENT_COST_NET DECIMAL,
PAYMENT_COST_VAT DECIMAL,
VAT_RATE DECIMAL,
SUBTOTAL_GROSS DECIMAL,
TOTAL_EXEMPT_ON_ORDER DECIMAL,
TOTAL_TAXABLE_AMOUNT DECIMAL,
TOTAL_CALCULATED_TAX DECIMAL,
TOTAL_VAT DECIMAL,
SAP_CUSTOMER_CODE TEXT,
SHIPPING_DATETIME DATETIME,
SHOP_TYPE_INDICATOR TEXT,
CONSUMER_STATE TEXT,
RETURN_REASON_SECONDARY TEXT,
TARGET_SYSTEM TEXT,
TAX_ID TEXT,
TRANSACTION_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
TRANSACTION_NUMBER TEXT,
WBS_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_REASON_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
ORDER_TYPE_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_H primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced,
constraint AK_ORDER_CUSTOMER_COU_TDE_HYBR unique (IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER, ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, COUNTRY_CODE)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER set comment = 'This table includes orders from several channels, one line per order item. ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.AVALARA_COMMITED_DATETIME is
'Commit date in Avalara';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.AVALARA_DATE is
'Avalara date';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.REFUND_DATE is
'Avalara refund date';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TAX_DATE is
'Avalara tax date';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.VOID_DATETIME is
'Avalara void date';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CODE is
'Code of the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DTE_RETAILER_CODE is
'DTE (Digital Trading Engagement) ID, if retailer is a DTE point';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.BASE_STORE is
'Indicator of base store.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_BUSINESS is
'e.g. "iqos-fr"';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.BUYER_NAME is
'Buyer Name';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CARRIER is
'Carrier';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CEGID_INTERNAL_ID is
'Cegid Internal Id';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CFDI_CODE is
'CFDI Code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CHANNEL_ADVISOR_ORDER_CODE is
'Channel Advisor order reference';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CHANNEL_ADVISOR_ORIGINAL_ORDER_REFERENCE is
'Channel Advisor original order reference (relevant in case of return order)';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CONTAINS_PREORDER_PRODUCT_FLAG is
'Indicates if order contains preorder products';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CONSUMER_FISCAL_REGIME_CODE is
'Consumer fiscal regime code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.COUNTRY_ISO_CODE is
'The country in which the check was configured';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CREDIT_NOTE_DATE is
'Date of credit note';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CREDIT_NOTE_NUMBER is
'Number of credit note';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Customer number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CONSUMER_TYPE is
'Type of customer';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CONSUMER_INTERNAL_CODE is
'Internal code of customer';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SHIPPING_BILLING_ADDRESS_FLAG is
'Flag indicating whether the shipping and billing addresses of the consumer are the same';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DELIVERY_METHOD_DESCRIPTION is
'Additional description of the delivery method';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DELIVERY_MODE is
'Applied delivery mode for the order.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DISPATCH_TYPE is
'Dispatch type';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_CHANNEL is
'Commercial channel through which the order took place.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL is
'Distribution channel ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_DIVISION is
'Division';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.EXPIRATION_DATETIME is
'Expiration Time ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.EXTERNAL_REFERENCE is
'External reference';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.INVOICE_FISCAL_ENTITY_TYPE is
'Invoice fiscal entity type';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_METHOD is
'Method of hard age verification';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_FLAG is
'Flag which indicates that the order requires hard age verification, boolean: "true" or "false"';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.INVOICE_DATE is
'Date of invoice';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.INVOICE_NUMBER is
'Number of invoice';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.INVOICE_REQUIRED_FLAG is
'invoice Required';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.DIRECT_RESELLER_MARKET_FLAG is
'Is the market Direct/Reseller';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.LENDING_EXTENSION_CONSUMED_FLAG is
'Customer selected the lending period extension';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAY_PER_LINK_FLAG is
'Flag which indicates the pay per link option, boolean: "true" or "false"';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PARTIAL_RETURN_FLAG is
'Indicates if order is partial returned';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.LENDING_ORDER_STATUS is
'Lending order status';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_LOCATION_ADDRESS is
'location address of the field coach';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_LOCATION_ID is
'ID of the physical location of the Sales occurred';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_LOCATION_NAME is
'Name of the physical location where the Sales occurred';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.RETURN_REASON_MAIN is
'Main reason why the item is returned';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_ID is
'ID of the Marketplace';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_NAME is
'Name of the marketplace, if relevant.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_ORDER_CODE is
'Code of the Marketplace order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_ORIGINAL_ORDER_CODE is
'Code of the Marketplace original order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CHANNEL is
'The primary touchpoint or channel for the sales order event.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_REASON is
'Reason why consumer placed an order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_REFERENCE_NUMBER is
'Order number / identifier of the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_STATUS is
'Status of the order. ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Time of the order creation';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME_LOCALIZED is
'Technical field';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_TYPE is
'Order Type Code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAYMENT_STATUS is
'Final status of the order payment.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAYMENT_METHOD is
'Payment method selected by the consumer or defined by the order channel.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PARENT_ORDER_CODE is
'Parent Order Code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_PLACED_BY is
'Indicates who placed the order, or the consumer ID if the consumer placed the order. Takes values: identity_identifier, if the order is placed by the consumer;';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PRODUCT_PLATFORM is
'Product platform';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PMI_SELLER_ID is
'email of the PMI representative, if the order placed by them on behalf of the consumer';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.RETURN_DATETIME is
'Date in which the order was returned by consumer';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY is
'Total amount of the order plus delivery cost';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_NET_PLUS_DELIVERY is
'Total amount of the order minus the sales tax, but plus delivery cost';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_GROSS_PLUS_DELIVERY_PLUS_VAT is
'Total amount of the order plus the delivery cost and value added tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_CURRENCY is
'currency ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_GROSS is
'Total amount of the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_GROSS_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Total amount of the order plus all discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_NET is
'Total amount of the order minus the sales tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SALES_PRICE_NET_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Total amount of the order minus the sales tax and with all discounts applied';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAYMENT_COST_GROSS is
'Payment cost gross breakdown';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAYMENT_COST_NET is
'Payment cost net breakdown';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.PAYMENT_COST_VAT is
'Payment cost vat breakdown';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.VAT_RATE is
'Rate to apply to calculate the tax value to add';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SUBTOTAL_GROSS is
'Subtotal of the order amount plus the total tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TOTAL_EXEMPT_ON_ORDER is
'total Exempt on Order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TOTAL_TAXABLE_AMOUNT is
'total item value base for sales tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TOTAL_CALCULATED_TAX is
'total tax calculated by Avalara';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TOTAL_VAT is
'Total value added tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SAP_CUSTOMER_CODE is
'SAP Customer ID';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SHIPPING_DATETIME is
'shipping Date ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.SHOP_TYPE_INDICATOR is
'Indicator of the shop, e.g. iqos-eg, iqos-mv, iqos-id, etc';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.CONSUMER_STATE is
'The state where consumer who makes the order lives in ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.RETURN_REASON_SECONDARY is
'Secondary reason why the item is returned';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TARGET_SYSTEM is
'Target system like LSP, ADL, FSP, INTERACTION';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TAX_ID is
'Tax ID';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TRANSACTION_IDENTIFIER is
'Avalara transaction unique code which may be later referenced for refunds/etc. ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.TRANSACTION_NUMBER is
'transaction number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.WBS_CODE is
'Used for reclassification for the sales allowance/discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_REASON_DESCRIPTION is
'Reason Description';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ORDER_TYPE_DESCRIPTION is
'Order Type Description';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';


List of diagrams containing the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Name

Code

Consumer_Order

LOGICAL_DATA_MODEL_TEMPLATE


List of associated business rules of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER

Name

Code

Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Source Sytem Date Format Yyyymmdd

Source Sytem Date Format Yyyymmdd
